name: Derbyshire Fruit Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the hot tea over the mixed dried fruit and sugar, then cover and leave to soak overnight.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C) and mark it as Mark 2.
3. Grease and line a 7-inch cake tin or two 1 lb loaf tins.
4. Stir together the egg, self-raising flour, mixed spice, grated nutmeg, and marmalade with the fruit, sugar, and tea mixture until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared tin(s).
6. Bake for 1½ to 2 hours, or until firm to the touch and a skewer inserted into the cake comes out clean.
7. Do not open the oven during the first hour of baking time.
8. This cake will keep well.
